title: Report Bot Telegram (RBT)
description: Allows you to respond to player reports in telegram
body:
Hello everyone, I made a plugin so that large projects or not, could comfortably respond to complaints or questions from players in minecraft, without logging into minecraft itself, but answering in telegram.

Plugin for Paper!
It was tested only on Paper

Before you start, you will need to start the server and then turn it off, go to the ReportPlugin folder and add it to config:
1) bot token
2) telegram supergroup (its id)
3)connection to the MongoDB database (format mongodb+srv://Fosya:password@cluster0.asfdasf.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority&appName=Cluster0)
4)admin IDs for tracking statistics

Commands for minecraft:
/report - opens the menu

Commands for telegram:
Available for admins
/help - shows all available commands
/modtickets [nickname] - show closed moderator tickets
/ticket [id] - show messages of a specific ticket
/stats - general statistics on closed tickets
/statsmod [nickname] - statistics of closed moderator tickets

For moderators, as well as for admins, the exit ticket and close ticket buttons are available.

In the super-telegram group, there should be 1 global topic for logging (where notifications about user entry and exit come from)

The plugin is completely in Russian, and if you want me to continue improving this plugin, please support me, it will let me know that you liked this plugin.


https://www.donationalerts.com/r/fosetov
